title: Bridge Essay: Self and the Brain. The Immune Metaphor.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through Self, and, the, Brain., The.

**Self and the Brain. The Immune Metaphor.** — Front Psychiatry. PMID: 33132930. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyt.2020.540676. One of the fundamental questions in neuroscience is how brain activity relates to conscious experience. Even though self-consciousness is considered an emergent property of the brain network, aquantum physics-based theory assigns amomentum of consciousness to the single neuron level. In this work, we present abrain self theory from an evolutionary biological perspective by analogy with the immune self. In this scheme, perinatal reactivity to self inputs would guide the selection of neocortica
